Home (recipes) page
====================

Screen: `/home`

Shows a list of recipes pulled from `/get-recipes`. Each recipe card links to the view recipe screen. Also provides quick actions to search, add a recipe and view techniques.

Service usage
-------------

- GET http://localhost:5000/get-recipes
- Images: GET http://localhost:5000/recipe-image/<id>

Frontend file: `frontend/features/recipe/home_page.dart`
